nodes.name: 也门
nodes.summary: 也门是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Sand partridge、Arabian partridge、Philby's partridge等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Onychognathus
nodes.summary: Onychognathus（Onychognathus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Slender-billed starling、Pale-winged starling、Red-winged starling等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Somali starling
nodes.summary: The Somali starling (Onychognathus blythii) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Somalia and Yemen. Habitat In the Degua Tembien district of north Ethiopia, the species can be observed in bushy and shrubby areas. References
